oncoAgent 0.1.0

Differential Expression Module

Source: R/differential_expression.R
run_deseq2.Rd

Unified interface for differential expression analysis using DESeq2, edgeR, and limma-voom. Includes consensus ranking across methods.

Performs differential expression analysis using DESeq2 with shrinkage estimation and multiple testing correction.

Usage

run_deseq2(
  count_matrix,
  col_data,
  contrast = NULL,
  lfc_threshold = 0,
  padj_threshold = 0.05,
  shrink = TRUE
)

Arguments

count_matrix

Gene x Sample count matrix (integer)

col_data

Sample metadata with 'condition' column

contrast

Character vector of length 3: c("condition", "tumor", "normal")

lfc_threshold

Log2 fold-change threshold for significance (default: 0)

padj_threshold

Adjusted p-value threshold (default: 0.05)

shrink

Logical, apply apeglm shrinkage (default: TRUE)

Value

data.frame with DE results sorted by adjusted p-value
